notes: Cycle 024 delivers covenant-keeper (Pivot_Score 8.30) — the first pip-installable tool to test whether AI agents maintain their declared behavioral commitments under tailored adversarial conditions. The Daniel 6:4-10 structural analog is precise: Daniel's behavior is attested as IDENTICAL before and after the adversarial decree ('just as he had done before'), the adversarial attack is TAILORED to his known behavioral commitment (prayer), and the test environment is SEALED with multi-party attestation. Current adversarial testing tools (Promptfoo, Augustus, SPIKEE) are offense-focused — they ask 'can we break this model?' covenant-keeper is defense-focused — it asks 'does this agent keep its promises under pressure?' 10 tools audited — none implement CovenantFidelity. Chief Theologian inducted into HALL OF FAME with score 9.5 and 8th Level 3 pattern above 8.0. 35 Level 3 patterns total. 24 tools in pipeline. Enforcement self-audit CLEAN. Next mandatory audit: cycle 025.
